name: Qwen3.5-Plus
archDisplay: Hosted product tier of the Qwen3.5 hybrid-attention MoE line (Gated DeltaNet + Gated Attention + MoE, Qwen3-Next lineage); exact parameter/expert configuration for the specific hosted 'Plus' checkpoint undisclosed
note: Hosted/API counterpart to the open-weight Qwen3.5-397B-A17B, launched the same day via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio with a 1M-token default context, official built-in tools, and adaptive tool use on top of the open-weight base.
